---
title: "Rates Desk Hypothesis Terminal"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

#quarto-document-content {
  padding-top: 0;
}

.terminal-page {
  --terminal-bg: #071019;
  --terminal-bg-soft: #0b1521;
  --terminal-panel: rgba(10, 20, 31, 0.9);
  --terminal-panel-strong: rgba(12, 23, 36, 0.98);
  --terminal-border: rgba(114, 166, 203, 0.18);
  --terminal-grid: rgba(79, 112, 141, 0.14);
  --terminal-ink: #e8eff5;
  --terminal-muted: #8ea4ba;
  --terminal-cyan: #4bc9dd;
  --terminal-orange: #ff9d31;
  --terminal-green: #48d597;
  --terminal-red: #ff6e6e;
  --terminal-purple: #9b87ff;
  --terminal-yellow: #ffc857;
  --terminal-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
  margin: 0 auto 2rem;
  padding: 1rem 0 3rem;
  color: var(--terminal-ink);
  font-family: "Avenir Next", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
}

.terminal-shell {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid rgba(84, 136, 176, 0.24);
  border-radius: 28px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 10% 8%, rgba(255, 157, 49, 0.16), transparent 22%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 90% 10%, rgba(75, 201, 221, 0.14), transparent 24%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(6, 12, 20, 0.98), rgba(8, 16, 26, 0.98));
  box-shadow: var(--terminal-shadow);
}

.terminal-shell::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(var(--terminal-grid) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, var(--terminal-grid) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 28px 28px;
  opacity: 0.22;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.terminal-topbar {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--terminal-border);
  background: rgba(7, 14, 22, 0.92);
}

.terminal-dots {
  display: inline-flex;
  gap: 0.45rem;
}

.terminal-dots span {
  width: 11px;
  height: 11px;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.terminal-dots span:nth-child(1) { background: #ff5f56; }
.terminal-dots span:nth-child(2) { background: #ffbd2e; }
.terminal-dots span:nth-child(3) { background: #27c93f; }

.terminal-brand {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.9rem;
  align-items: center;
  font-family: "SF Mono", "Menlo", "Consolas", monospace;
  font-size: 0.83rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.brand-kicker {
  color: var(--terminal-orange);
  font-weight: 700;
}

.brand-title {
  color: var(--terminal-ink);
  font-weight: 600;
}

.brand-chip {
  padding: 0.28rem 0.55rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(75, 201, 221, 0.26);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--terminal-cyan);
}

.terminal-status {
  justify-self: end;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  font-family: "SF Mono", "Menlo", "Consolas", monospace;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}

.status-ping {
  width: 10px;
  height: 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--terminal-green);
  box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(72, 213, 151, 0.65);
}

.terminal-app {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  padding: 1.25rem;
}

.terminal-loading,
.terminal-error {
  padding: 3rem 1.4rem;
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  text-align: center;
  font-family: "SF Mono", "Menlo", "Consolas", monospace;
}

.terminal-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.terminal-panel {
  border: 1px solid var(--terminal-border);
  border-radius: 24px;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(8, 17, 27, 0.92), rgba(12, 22, 34, 0.92));
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
}

.terminal-panel-inner {
  padding: 1.15rem 1.2rem 1.25rem;
}

.section-kicker {
  margin: 0 0 0.55rem;
  color: var(--terminal-cyan);
  font-family: "SF Mono", "Menlo", "Consolas", monospace;
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.section-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2vw, 1.85rem);
  line-height: 1.08;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}

.section-copy {
  margin: 0.55rem 0 0;
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  max-width: 74ch;
}

.mono {
  font-family: "SF Mono", "Menlo", "Consolas", monospace;
}

.headline-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(8, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.8rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.headline-card {
  padding: 0.78rem 0.84rem 0.84rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(118, 163, 195, 0.14);
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: rgba(12, 23, 36, 0.74);
}

.headline-label {
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  font-family: "SF Mono", "Menlo", "Consolas", monospace;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.headline-value {
  margin-top: 0.35rem;
  font-size: 1.18rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}

.headline-subvalue {
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}

.ticker-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  margin-top: 0.95rem;
}

.ticker-item {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.72rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(118, 163, 195, 0.14);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(12, 23, 36, 0.74);
  font-family: "SF Mono", "Menlo", "Consolas", monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.ticker-name {
  color: var(--terminal-cyan);
  font-weight: 700;
}

.ticker-latest {
  color: var(--terminal-ink);
}

.ticker-change {
  font-weight: 700;
}

.desk-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 0.95fr 0.95fr;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.panel-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.1fr) minmax(0, 0.9fr);
  gap: 1rem;
}

.section-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-top: 0.95rem;
}

.desk-list,
.score-grid,
.bias-grid,
.macro-grid,
.release-table,
.daily-table {
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
}

.desk-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.72rem;
}

.desk-item,
.score-card,
.bias-card,
.macro-item {
  border: 1px solid rgba(118, 163, 195, 0.14);
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: rgba(12, 23, 36, 0.74);
}

.desk-item,
.score-card,
.bias-card,
.macro-item {
  padding: 0.78rem 0.84rem 0.9rem;
}

.desk-item strong,
.score-card strong,
.bias-card strong,
.macro-item strong {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.96rem;
}

.desk-item p,
.score-card p,
.bias-card p,
.macro-item p {
  margin: 0.4rem 0 0;
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.desk-meta,
.score-meta,
.bias-meta {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  margin-top: 0.35rem;
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  font-family: "SF Mono", "Menlo", "Consolas", monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.score-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.72rem;
}

.score-bar,
.prob-track,
.contribution-track {
  position: relative;
  height: 10px;
  margin-top: 0.62rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(113, 141, 166, 0.12);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.score-fill,
.prob-fill,
.contribution-fill {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0 auto 0 0;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.bias-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.72rem;
}

.status-pill,
.meta-pill {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.34rem 0.58rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-family: "SF Mono", "Menlo", "Consolas", monospace;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
}

.status-pill {
  border: 1px solid rgba(118, 163, 195, 0.2);
}

.status-pill.is-active {
  color: var(--terminal-orange);
  border-color: rgba(255, 157, 49, 0.34);
  background: rgba(255, 157, 49, 0.1);
}

.status-pill.is-watch {
  color: var(--terminal-yellow);
  border-color: rgba(255, 200, 87, 0.34);
  background: rgba(255, 200, 87, 0.08);
}

.status-pill.is-calm {
  color: var(--terminal-green);
  border-color: rgba(72, 213, 151, 0.34);
  background: rgba(72, 213, 151, 0.08);
}

.meta-pill {
  background: rgba(75, 201, 221, 0.1);
  color: var(--terminal-cyan);
  border: 1px solid rgba(75, 201, 221, 0.2);
}

.release-table-wrap,
.table-wrap {
  margin-top: 0.85rem;
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.terminal-table {
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 760px;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

.terminal-table th,
.terminal-table td {
  padding: 0.68rem 0.62rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(114, 166, 203, 0.12);
  vertical-align: top;
}

.terminal-table th {
  color: var(--terminal-cyan);
  font-family: "SF Mono", "Menlo", "Consolas", monospace;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.terminal-table td {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.mini-note {
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}

.chart-wrap {
  margin-top: 0.85rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(114, 166, 203, 0.16);
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(6, 14, 22, 0.92), rgba(9, 18, 30, 0.92));
  overflow: hidden;
}

.history-chart {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
}

.history-legend {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.8rem 1rem;
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem 1rem;
}

.legend-item {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.42rem;
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  font-size: 0.86rem;
}

.legend-swatch {
  width: 11px;
  height: 11px;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.macro-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 0.72rem;
}

.macro-value {
  margin-top: 0.42rem;
  font-size: 1.22rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}

.macro-date {
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
}

.tone-positive {
  color: var(--terminal-green);
}

.tone-negative {
  color: var(--terminal-red);
}

.tone-neutral {
  color: var(--terminal-yellow);
}

.foot-note {
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  color: var(--terminal-muted);
  font-size: 0.84rem;
}

@media (max-width: 1400px) {
  .headline-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .desk-grid,
  .panel-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .headline-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 720px) {
  .terminal-topbar {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    justify-items: start;
  }

  .terminal-status {
    justify-self: start;
  }

  .terminal-app {
    padding: 0.85rem;
  }

  .terminal-panel-inner {
    padding: 0.95rem;
  }
}
</style>

```{=html}
<div class="terminal-page">
  <div class="terminal-shell">
    <div class="terminal-topbar">
      <div class="terminal-dots" aria-hidden="true">
        <span></span>
        <span></span>
        <span></span>
      </div>
      <div class="terminal-brand">
        <span class="brand-kicker">Rates desk</span>
        <span class="brand-title">SMBC-style stagflation monitor</span>
        <span class="brand-chip">public signal workflow</span>
      </div>
      <div class="terminal-status">
        <span class="status-ping"></span>
        <span>Loading published snapshot</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="terminal-app" id="war-terminal-app">
      <div class="terminal-loading">Initializing desk hypothesis terminal...</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

<script>
(function () {
  const SNAPSHOT_PATH = "generated/snapshot.json";
  const COLORS = {
    contained_shock: "#48d597",
    inflation_shock: "#ff9d31",
    stagflation: "#ff5e7a",
    growth_slowdown: "#6f86ff"
  };

  const app = document.getElementById("war-terminal-app");
  const status = document.querySelector(".terminal-status");

  function escapeHtml(value) {
    return String(value ?? "")
      .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
      .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
      .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
      .replaceAll('"', "&quot;")
      .replaceAll("'", "&#39;");
  }

  function num(value) {
    const parsed = Number(value);
    return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
  }

  function clamp(value, min, max) {
    return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
  }

  function pct(value, digits = 1) {
    const parsed = num(value);
    if (parsed === null) return "n/a";
    return `${(parsed * 100).toFixed(digits)}%`;
  }

  function signed(value, digits = 2, suffix = "") {
    const parsed = num(value);
    if (parsed === null) return "n/a";
    const sign = parsed > 0 ? "+" : "";
    return `${sign}${parsed.toFixed(digits)}${suffix}`;
  }

  function fixed(value, digits = 2) {
    const parsed = num(value);
    if (parsed === null) return "n/a";
    return parsed.toFixed(digits);
  }

  function prettyDateTime(value) {
    const parsed = new Date(value);
    if (Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())) return escapeHtml(value);
    return parsed.toLocaleString("en-US", {
      month: "short",
      day: "numeric",
      hour: "numeric",
      minute: "2-digit"
    });
  }

  function formatLatestValue(row) {
    if (!row) return "n/a";
    const value = num(row.latest_value);
    if (value === null) return "n/a";
    const unit = String(row.unit || "");
    if (unit === "$ mn") return `$${(value / 1000).toFixed(1)}bn`;
    if (unit === "$ bn") return `$${value.toFixed(1)}bn`;
    if (unit === "pct") return `${value.toFixed(2)}%`;
    if (unit === "index") {
      return value.toLocaleString("en-US", {
        minimumFractionDigits: 0,
        maximumFractionDigits: 2
      });
    }
    if (unit.startsWith("$/")) return `$${value.toFixed(2)}`;
    return value.toLocaleString("en-US", {
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 2
    });
  }

  function formatMacroSnapshot(row) {
    const value = num(row?.snapshot_value);
    if (value === null) return "n/a";
    if (row.snapshot_label === "m/m change") return `${signed(value, 0)}k`;
    if (row.snapshot_label === "y/y") return `${value.toFixed(2)}%`;
    if (row.snapshot_label === "latest" && row.unit === "pct") return `${value.toFixed(2)}%`;
    return value.toLocaleString("en-US", {
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 2
    });
  }

  function signalByLabel(signals, label) {
    return signals.find((row) => row.label === label) || null;
  }

  function scenarioById(rows, id) {
    return rows.find((row) => row.scenario_id === id) || null;
  }

  function questionById(rows, id) {
    return rows.find((row) => row.question === id) || null;
  }

  function latestValue(signals, label) {
    const row = signalByLabel(signals, label);
    return row ? num(row.latest_value) : null;
  }

  function spreadBps(a, b) {
    if (a === null || b === null) return null;
    return (a - b) * 100;
  }

  function toneClass(value) {
    const parsed = num(value);
    if (parsed === null) return "tone-neutral";
    if (parsed > 0.08) return "tone-positive";
    if (parsed < -0.08) return "tone-negative";
    return "tone-neutral";
  }

  function legPct(score) {
    return clamp(((num(score) ?? 0) + 1) / 2, 0, 1);
  }

  function scoreLabel(value) {
    if (value >= 0.68) return "High";
    if (value >= 0.52) return "Elevated";
    if (value >= 0.38) return "Moderate";
    return "Low";
  }

  function historyChart(history, scenarios) {
    const width = 920;
    const height = 310;
    const left = 56;
    const right = 18;
    const top = 18;
    const bottom = 42;
    const plotWidth = width - left - right;
    const plotHeight = height - top - bottom;
    const scenarioIds = ["inflation_shock", "stagflation", "growth_slowdown", "contained_shock"];
    const activeScenarios = scenarioIds
      .map((id) => scenarios.find((row) => row.scenario_id === id))
      .filter(Boolean);

    const grid = [0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1].map((level) => {
      const y = top + (1 - level) * plotHeight;
      return `
        <line x1="${left}" y1="${y}" x2="${width - right}" y2="${y}" stroke="rgba(142,164,186,0.16)" stroke-width="1"></line>
        <text x="${left - 10}" y="${y + 4}" fill="rgba(142,164,186,0.72)" text-anchor="end" font-size="12" font-family="SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace">${Math.round(level * 100)}%</text>
      `;
    }).join("");

    const xAxis = `
      <line x1="${left}" y1="${height - bottom}" x2="${width - right}" y2="${height - bottom}" stroke="rgba(142,164,186,0.24)" stroke-width="1.2"></line>
      <text x="${left}" y="${height - 14}" fill="rgba(142,164,186,0.72)" font-size="12" font-family="SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace">${escapeHtml(history[0].date)}</text>
      <text x="${width - right}" y="${height - 14}" fill="rgba(142,164,186,0.72)" text-anchor="end" font-size="12" font-family="SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace">${escapeHtml(history[history.length - 1].date)}</text>
    `;

    const lines = activeScenarios.map((scenario) => {
      const key = `${scenario.scenario_id}_probability`;
      const color = COLORS[scenario.scenario_id] || "#4bc9dd";
      const points = history.map((row, idx) => {
        const x = left + (idx * plotWidth) / Math.max(history.length - 1, 1);
        const y = top + (1 - (num(row[key]) ?? 0)) * plotHeight;
        return `${x.toFixed(2)},${y.toFixed(2)}`;
      }).join(" ");
      return `<polyline fill="none" stroke="${color}" stroke-width="${scenario.scenario_id === "stagflation" ? 3.4 : 2.5}" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" points="${points}"></polyline>`;
    }).join("");

    const legend = activeScenarios.map((scenario) => `
      <div class="legend-item">
        <span class="legend-swatch" style="background:${COLORS[scenario.scenario_id] || "#4bc9dd"}"></span>
        ${escapeHtml(scenario.title)}
      </div>
    `).join("");

    return `
      <div class="chart-wrap">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 ${width} ${height}" class="history-chart" role="img" aria-label="Desk hypothesis path from war start to latest date">
          ${grid}
          ${xAxis}
          ${lines}
        </svg>
        <div class="history-legend">${legend}</div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function headlineCard(label, value, subvalue, color = "") {
    return `
      <div class="headline-card">
        <div class="headline-label">${escapeHtml(label)}</div>
        <div class="headline-value" ${color ? `style="color:${color}"` : ""}>${escapeHtml(value)}</div>
        <div class="headline-subvalue">${escapeHtml(subvalue)}</div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function tickerRow(items) {
    return items.map((item) => `
      <div class="ticker-item">
        <span class="ticker-name">${escapeHtml(item.label)}</span>
        <span class="ticker-latest">${escapeHtml(item.latest)}</span>
        <span class="ticker-change ${item.tone || ""}">${escapeHtml(item.change)}</span>
      </div>
    `).join("");
  }

  function scoreCard(label, value, meta, color) {
    return `
      <div class="score-card">
        <strong>${escapeHtml(label)}</strong>
        <div class="score-meta">
          <span>${escapeHtml(scoreLabel(value))}</span>
          <span>${pct(value)}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="score-bar">
          <div class="score-fill" style="width:${(value * 100).toFixed(1)}%;background:${color};"></div>
        </div>
        <p>${escapeHtml(meta)}</p>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function deskItem(title, meta, note) {
    return `
      <div class="desk-item">
        <strong>${escapeHtml(title)}</strong>
        <div class="desk-meta"><span>${escapeHtml(meta.left)}</span><span class="${meta.tone || ""}">${escapeHtml(meta.right)}</span></div>
        <p>${escapeHtml(note)}</p>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function biasCard(statusClass, statusLabel, title, note, trade) {
    return `
      <div class="bias-card">
        <div class="desk-meta">
          <span class="status-pill ${statusClass}">${escapeHtml(statusLabel)}</span>
          <span class="meta-pill">${escapeHtml(trade)}</span>
        </div>
        <strong style="margin-top:0.55rem;">${escapeHtml(title)}</strong>
        <p>${escapeHtml(note)}</p>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function macroItems(rows) {
    return rows.map((row) => `
      <div class="macro-item">
        <strong>${escapeHtml(row.label)}</strong>
        <div class="macro-value">${escapeHtml(formatMacroSnapshot(row))}</div>
        <p class="macro-date">${escapeHtml(row.snapshot_label)} | latest ${escapeHtml(row.latest_date)}</p>
      </div>
    `).join("");
  }

  function signalRows(rows) {
    return rows.map((row) => `
      <tr>
        <td><strong>${escapeHtml(row.label)}</strong><div class="mini-note">${escapeHtml(row.note || "")}</div></td>
        <td class="mono">${escapeHtml(row.latest)}</td>
        <td class="mono ${row.tone1 || ""}">${escapeHtml(row.change1)}</td>
        <td class="mono ${row.tone5 || ""}">${escapeHtml(row.change5)}</td>
        <td class="mono ${row.ztone || ""}">${escapeHtml(row.zscore)}</td>
      </tr>
    `).join("");
  }

  function releaseRows(rows) {
    return rows.map((row) => `
      <tr>
        <td><strong>${escapeHtml(row.release)}</strong><div class="mini-note">${escapeHtml(row.watch)}</div></td>
        <td>${escapeHtml(row.hot)}</td>
        <td>${escapeHtml(row.cool)}</td>
        <td><span class="meta-pill">${escapeHtml(row.bias)}</span></td>
      </tr>
    `).join("");
  }

  function dailyRows(history) {
    return history.map((row) => `
      <tr>
        <td class="mono">${escapeHtml(row.date)}</td>
        <td><strong>${escapeHtml(row.dominant_scenario)}</strong></td>
        <td class="mono">${pct(row.stagflation_probability)}</td>
        <td class="mono">${signed(row.inflation_pressure, 2)}</td>
        <td class="mono">${signed(row.growth_drag, 2)}</td>
        <td class="mono">${signed(row.financial_tightening, 2)}</td>
      </tr>
    `).join("");
  }

  function buildDeskState(snapshot) {
    const signals = Array.isArray(snapshot.market_signals) ? snapshot.market_signals : [];
    const macro = Array.isArray(snapshot.macro_backdrop) ? snapshot.macro_backdrop : [];
    const questions = Array.isArray(snapshot.five_questions) ? snapshot.five_questions : [];
    const scenarios = Array.isArray(snapshot.scenarios) ? snapshot.scenarios : [];
    const history = Array.isArray(snapshot.scenario_history) ? snapshot.scenario_history : [];
    const transitions = Array.isArray(snapshot.transitions) ? snapshot.transitions : [];

    const y2 = signalByLabel(signals, "2Y Treasury yield");
    const y10 = signalByLabel(signals, "10Y Treasury yield");
    const y30 = signalByLabel(signals, "30Y Treasury yield");
    const be10 = signalByLabel(signals, "10Y breakeven inflation");
    const hy = signalByLabel(signals, "U.S. high yield spread");
    const brent = signalByLabel(signals, "Brent crude");
    const effr = signalByLabel(signals, "Effective fed funds rate");
    const sofr = signalByLabel(signals, "SOFR");
    const bill3m = signalByLabel(signals, "3M T-bill yield");
    const onRrp = signalByLabel(signals, "ON RRP take-up");
    const reserves = signalByLabel(signals, "Reserve balances");
    const vix = signalByLabel(signals, "VIX");
    const spx = signalByLabel(signals, "S&P 500");

    const curve2s10s = spreadBps(num(y10?.latest_value), num(y2?.latest_value));
    const curve2s10s1d = (num(y10?.change_1) ?? 0) - (num(y2?.change_1) ?? 0);
    const sofrEffr = spreadBps(num(sofr?.latest_value), num(effr?.latest_value));
    const billEffr = spreadBps(num(bill3m?.latest_value), num(effr?.latest_value));

    const qInfl = questionById(questions, "inflation_pressure");
    const qGrowth = questionById(questions, "growth_drag");
    const qFin = questionById(questions, "financial_tightening");

    const inflationLeg = legPct(qInfl?.score);
    const growthLeg = legPct(((num(qGrowth?.score) ?? 0) + (num(qFin?.score) ?? 0)) / 2);
    const fundingLeg = clamp(
      (Math.min(Math.abs(sofrEffr ?? 0) / 10, 1) * 0.35) +
      (Math.min(Math.abs(billEffr ?? 0) / 20, 1) * 0.2) +
      (Math.min(Math.max(0, -(num(reserves?.composite_z) ?? 0)) / 2, 1) * 0.25) +
      (Math.min(Math.max(0, num(vix?.composite_z) ?? 0) / 2, 1) * 0.2),
      0,
      1
    );

    const stag = scenarioById(scenarios, "stagflation");
    const inflation = scenarioById(scenarios, "inflation_shock");
    const growth = scenarioById(scenarios, "growth_slowdown");
    const dominant = scenarios[0] || stag;

    const stagProb = num(stag?.probability) ?? 0;
    let hypothesisTone = "Not dominant";
    let hypothesisClass = "is-calm";
    if (stagProb >= 0.3 || (inflationLeg >= 0.62 && growthLeg >= 0.58)) {
      hypothesisTone = "Live risk";
      hypothesisClass = "is-active";
    } else if (stagProb >= 0.2 || (inflationLeg >= 0.56 && growthLeg >= 0.46)) {
      hypothesisTone = "Watch";
      hypothesisClass = "is-watch";
    }

    const deskBiases = [];
    const y2Move = num(y2?.change_1) ?? 0;
    const beMove = num(be10?.change_1) ?? 0;
    const brentMove = num(brent?.change_1) ?? 0;
    const hyMove = num(hy?.change_1) ?? 0;

    if (inflationLeg >= 0.58 && y2Move > 0) {
      deskBiases.push({
        statusClass: "is-active",
        statusLabel: "Active",
        title: "Front-end still prices inflation discipline",
        note: "2Y rates are firm while the inflation leg remains elevated. This keeps a short-front-end bias alive.",
        trade: "Short front-end"
      });
    } else if (growthLeg >= 0.6 && y2Move < 0) {
      deskBiases.push({
        statusClass: "is-active",
        statusLabel: "Active",
        title: "Growth scare is pushing the front end lower",
        note: "The market is starting to price cuts faster than inflation persistence.",
        trade: "Receive front-end"
      });
    } else {
      deskBiases.push({
        statusClass: "is-watch",
        statusLabel: "Watch",
        title: "Front-end is not in a clean directional regime",
        note: "The desk should treat the next data print as the main trigger for the front-end call.",
        trade: "Wait for release"
      });
    }

    if (curve2s10s1d < -1 && inflationLeg >= growthLeg) {
      deskBiases.push({
        statusClass: "is-active",
        statusLabel: "Active",
        title: "Curve is flattening under inflation pressure",
        note: "The front end is moving more than the long end, which is the classic flattener expression.",
        trade: "2s10s flattener"
      });
    } else if (curve2s10s1d > 1 && growthLeg > inflationLeg) {
      deskBiases.push({
        statusClass: "is-active",
        statusLabel: "Active",
        title: "Curve is steepening on growth fear",
        note: "The market is leaning toward easier policy and lower front-end rates.",
        trade: "Bull steepener"
      });
    } else {
      deskBiases.push({
        statusClass: "is-watch",
        statusLabel: "Watch",
        title: "Curve signal is mixed",
        note: "The 2s10s move is not yet strong enough to force a directional curve trade.",
        trade: "Hold neutral curve"
      });
    }

    if (brentMove > 0 && beMove > 0) {
      deskBiases.push({
        statusClass: "is-active",
        statusLabel: "Active",
        title: "Oil and breakevens are reinforcing the inflation leg",
        note: "That keeps inflation hedges and breakeven trades relevant to the desk thesis.",
        trade: "Inflation trade"
      });
    } else if (hyMove > 0 && growthLeg >= 0.56) {
      deskBiases.push({
        statusClass: "is-watch",
        statusLabel: "Watch",
        title: "Credit is starting to lean into the growth side",
        note: "This is the channel that can convert an inflation shock into a stagflation or recession debate.",
        trade: "Add growth hedge"
      });
    } else {
      deskBiases.push({
        statusClass: "is-calm",
        statusLabel: "Calm",
        title: "Inflation trade is not being strongly reinforced today",
        note: "Breakevens and oil are not both pressing in the same direction.",
        trade: "No fresh add"
      });
    }

    const catalysts = [
      deskItem(
        "Oil overlay",
        { left: brent ? formatLatestValue(brent) : "n/a", right: brent ? signed(brent.change_1, 2) : "n/a", tone: toneClass((num(brent?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10) },
        brentMove > 0 ? "Higher Brent reinforces the inflation leg of the war hypothesis." : "Brent is not adding fresh pressure to the inflation leg today."
      ),
      deskItem(
        "Breakeven read",
        { left: be10 ? formatLatestValue(be10) : "n/a", right: be10 ? signed(be10.change_1, 2) : "n/a", tone: toneClass((num(be10?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10) },
        beMove > 0 ? "Inflation compensation is firming, which keeps the hawkish side of the hypothesis alive." : "Inflation compensation is not accelerating, so the inflation leg is not cleanly dominant."
      ),
      deskItem(
        "Rates and curve",
        { left: curve2s10s === null ? "n/a" : `${signed(curve2s10s, 1)} bps`, right: `${signed(curve2s10s1d, 1)} bps 1d`, tone: toneClass(curve2s10s1d / 10) },
        curve2s10s1d < 0 ? "The front end is leading, which is what the desk watches first when inflation risk dominates." : "The curve is not flattening aggressively enough to force a hawkish curve call."
      ),
      deskItem(
        "Credit and risk",
        { left: hy ? formatLatestValue(hy) : "n/a", right: hy ? signed(hy.change_1, 2) : "n/a", tone: toneClass((num(hy?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10) },
        (num(hy?.change_1) ?? 0) > 0 ? "Credit is widening, which is the growth-damage channel the stagflation hypothesis needs." : "Credit remains contained, so the growth leg is not yet fully confirmed."
      ),
      deskItem(
        "Funding and cash",
        { left: sofrEffr === null ? "n/a" : signed(sofrEffr, 1, " bps"), right: billEffr === null ? "n/a" : signed(billEffr, 1, " bps"), tone: toneClass(((Math.abs(sofrEffr ?? 0) + Math.abs(billEffr ?? 0)) / 2) / 10) },
        fundingLeg >= 0.45 ? "Front-end liquidity is contributing to the tightening story and can amplify the macro thesis." : "Funding conditions look orderly enough that the macro story is still the main driver."
      )
    ];

    const releasePlaybook = [
      {
        release: "CPI / PCE",
        watch: "Watch Δ2Y, Δ10Y, Δ2s10s, ΔBE10",
        hot: "2Y up, BE up, curve flatter, stagflation risk rises if growth leg also stays firm",
        cool: "2Y down, BE down, curve can steepen, inflation leg softens",
        bias: inflationLeg >= 0.58 ? "Hot print hurts most" : "Balanced"
      },
      {
        release: "NFP",
        watch: "Watch 2Y, HY OAS, S&P, VIX",
        hot: "Front-end hawkish, cuts priced out, stagflation call weakens",
        cool: "Growth scare deepens, front-end rallies, growth leg strengthens",
        bias: growthLeg >= 0.52 ? "Weak payroll most important" : "Balanced"
      },
      {
        release: "Claims",
        watch: "Watch front-end and HY follow-through",
        hot: "Low claims keep policy restrictive",
        cool: "Higher claims support growth-risk and pivot talk",
        bias: growthLeg >= 0.52 ? "Claims deterioration matters" : "Secondary"
      },
      {
        release: "ISM / PMIs",
        watch: "Watch 2s10s, credit, equities",
        hot: "Growth resilience weakens stagflation thesis",
        cool: "Weak activity plus firm BE is the classic stagflation mix",
        bias: stagProb >= 0.24 ? "Weak PMI most dangerous" : "Watchlist"
      }
    ];

    const signalTable = [
      {
        label: "2Y Treasury",
        note: "front-end policy proxy",
        latest: formatLatestValue(y2),
        change1: signed(y2?.change_1, 2),
        change5: signed(y2?.change_5, 2),
        zscore: signed(y2?.composite_z, 2),
        tone1: toneClass((num(y2?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10),
        tone5: toneClass((num(y2?.change_5) ?? 0) / 10),
        ztone: toneClass(num(y2?.composite_z))
      },
      {
        label: "10Y Treasury",
        note: "macro anchor",
        latest: formatLatestValue(y10),
        change1: signed(y10?.change_1, 2),
        change5: signed(y10?.change_5, 2),
        zscore: signed(y10?.composite_z, 2),
        tone1: toneClass((num(y10?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10),
        tone5: toneClass((num(y10?.change_5) ?? 0) / 10),
        ztone: toneClass(num(y10?.composite_z))
      },
      {
        label: "30Y Treasury",
        note: "long-end funding signal",
        latest: formatLatestValue(y30),
        change1: signed(y30?.change_1, 2),
        change5: signed(y30?.change_5, 2),
        zscore: signed(y30?.composite_z, 2),
        tone1: toneClass((num(y30?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10),
        tone5: toneClass((num(y30?.change_5) ?? 0) / 10),
        ztone: toneClass(num(y30?.composite_z))
      },
      {
        label: "2s10s",
        note: "derived curve slope",
        latest: curve2s10s === null ? "n/a" : signed(curve2s10s, 1, " bps"),
        change1: signed(curve2s10s1d, 1, " bps"),
        change5: "n/a",
        zscore: "n/a",
        tone1: toneClass(curve2s10s1d / 10),
        tone5: "",
        ztone: ""
      },
      {
        label: "10Y breakeven",
        note: "inflation market",
        latest: formatLatestValue(be10),
        change1: signed(be10?.change_1, 2),
        change5: signed(be10?.change_5, 2),
        zscore: signed(be10?.composite_z, 2),
        tone1: toneClass((num(be10?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10),
        tone5: toneClass((num(be10?.change_5) ?? 0) / 10),
        ztone: toneClass(num(be10?.composite_z))
      },
      {
        label: "HY OAS",
        note: "growth and credit stress",
        latest: formatLatestValue(hy),
        change1: signed(hy?.change_1, 2),
        change5: signed(hy?.change_5, 2),
        zscore: signed(hy?.composite_z, 2),
        tone1: toneClass((num(hy?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10),
        tone5: toneClass((num(hy?.change_5) ?? 0) / 10),
        ztone: toneClass(num(hy?.composite_z))
      },
      {
        label: "Brent crude",
        note: "war shock input",
        latest: formatLatestValue(brent),
        change1: signed(brent?.change_1, 2),
        change5: signed(brent?.change_5, 2),
        zscore: signed(brent?.composite_z, 2),
        tone1: toneClass((num(brent?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10),
        tone5: toneClass((num(brent?.change_5) ?? 0) / 10),
        ztone: toneClass(num(brent?.composite_z))
      },
      {
        label: "SOFR - EFFR",
        note: "funding spread proxy",
        latest: sofrEffr === null ? "n/a" : signed(sofrEffr, 1, " bps"),
        change1: "n/a",
        change5: "n/a",
        zscore: fundingLeg ? pct(fundingLeg) : "n/a",
        tone1: toneClass((Math.abs(sofrEffr ?? 0)) / 10),
        tone5: "",
        ztone: toneClass(fundingLeg - 0.5)
      }
    ];

    const headlineCards = [
      headlineCard("2Y", formatLatestValue(y2), y2 ? `1d ${signed(y2.change_1, 2)}` : "n/a"),
      headlineCard("10Y", formatLatestValue(y10), y10 ? `1d ${signed(y10.change_1, 2)}` : "n/a"),
      headlineCard("30Y", formatLatestValue(y30), y30 ? `1d ${signed(y30.change_1, 2)}` : "n/a"),
      headlineCard("2s10s", curve2s10s === null ? "n/a" : signed(curve2s10s, 1, " bps"), `${signed(curve2s10s1d, 1, " bps")} 1d`),
      headlineCard("10Y BE", formatLatestValue(be10), be10 ? `1d ${signed(be10.change_1, 2)}` : "n/a"),
      headlineCard("HY OAS", formatLatestValue(hy), hy ? `1d ${signed(hy.change_1, 2)}` : "n/a"),
      headlineCard("Brent", formatLatestValue(brent), brent ? `1d ${signed(brent.change_1, 2)}` : "n/a"),
      headlineCard("Stagflation", hypothesisTone, `${pct(stagProb)} now`, COLORS.stagflation)
    ].join("");

    const tickerItems = [
      { label: "EFFR", latest: formatLatestValue(effr), change: effr ? signed(effr.change_1, 2) : "n/a", tone: toneClass((num(effr?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10) },
      { label: "SOFR-EFFR", latest: sofrEffr === null ? "n/a" : signed(sofrEffr, 1, " bps"), change: fundingLeg ? pct(fundingLeg) : "n/a", tone: toneClass(fundingLeg - 0.5) },
      { label: "3M-EFFR", latest: billEffr === null ? "n/a" : signed(billEffr, 1, " bps"), change: bill3m ? formatLatestValue(bill3m) : "n/a", tone: toneClass((Math.abs(billEffr ?? 0)) / 15) },
      { label: "VIX", latest: formatLatestValue(vix), change: vix ? signed(vix.change_1, 2) : "n/a", tone: toneClass((num(vix?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10) },
      { label: "S&P", latest: formatLatestValue(spx), change: spx ? signed(spx.change_1, 2) : "n/a", tone: toneClass((num(spx?.change_1) ?? 0) / 10) }
    ];

    const macroCards = macroItems(macro);
    const historyStart = history[0];
    const latestTransition = transitions.length ? transitions[transitions.length - 1] : null;

    return {
      signals,
      scenarios,
      history,
      transitions,
      dominant,
      stag,
      inflation,
      growth,
      inflationLeg,
      growthLeg,
      fundingLeg,
      stagProb,
      hypothesisTone,
      hypothesisClass,
      headlineCards,
      tickerItems,
      catalysts,
      deskBiases,
      releasePlaybook,
      signalTable,
      macroCards,
      historyStart,
      latestTransition,
      startDate: snapshot.active_event?.start_date || historyStart?.date || "",
      generatedAt: snapshot.generated_at
    };
  }

  function render(snapshot) {
    const state = buildDeskState(snapshot);
    const history = state.history;
    const scenarios = state.scenarios;

    app.innerHTML = `
      <div class="terminal-grid">
        <section class="terminal-panel">
          <div class="terminal-panel-inner">
            <p class="section-kicker">Desk question</p>
            <h1 class="section-title">Does the U.S.-Iran war become a stagflation shock?</h1>
            <p class="section-copy">This screen is organized like a rates desk workflow: morning core board first, overnight catalysts second, release reaction logic third, and the stagflation hypothesis score last. The point is not to tell every macro story. The point is to decide whether inflation and growth damage are appearing together strongly enough to change the desk call.</p>
            <div class="headline-grid">${state.headlineCards}</div>
            <div class="ticker-row">${tickerRow(state.tickerItems)}</div>
          </div>
        </section>

        <div class="desk-grid">
          <section class="terminal-panel">
            <div class="terminal-panel-inner">
              <p class="section-kicker">Morning workflow</p>
              <h2 class="section-title">Overnight catalyst log</h2>
              <p class="section-copy">This is the stripped-down first pass a U.S. rates desk would run before cash hours: oil, breakevens, curve, credit, and funding.</p>
              <div class="section-stack">${state.catalysts.join("")}</div>
              <div class="desk-meta" style="margin-top:0.9rem;">
                <span class="meta-pill">War start ${escapeHtml(state.startDate)}</span>
                <span class="meta-pill">Snapshot ${escapeHtml(prettyDateTime(state.generatedAt))}</span>
              </div>
              ${state.latestTransition ? `<p class="foot-note">Latest regime flip: ${escapeHtml(state.latestTransition.date)} | ${escapeHtml(state.latestTransition.note)}</p>` : ""}
            </div>
          </section>

          <section class="terminal-panel">
            <div class="terminal-panel-inner">
              <p class="section-kicker">Hypothesis board</p>
              <h2 class="section-title">Stagflation scorecard</h2>
              <p class="section-copy">The desk hypothesis only becomes live when the inflation leg and the growth-damage leg are both meaningfully elevated. Funding stress is the amplifier, not the whole story.</p>
              <div class="score-grid">
                ${scoreCard("Inflation leg", state.inflationLeg, "Built from inflation-pressure signals such as Brent, breakevens, and inflation-sensitive rates.", COLORS.inflation_shock)}
                ${scoreCard("Growth leg", state.growthLeg, "Built from growth-drag and financial-tightening pressure together, because stagflation needs both.", COLORS.growth_slowdown)}
                ${scoreCard("Funding / liquidity leg", state.fundingLeg, "Built from SOFR-EFFR, bill-EFFR, reserves, and volatility as a stress amplifier.", "#4bc9dd")}
                ${scoreCard("Combined stagflation likelihood", state.stagProb, "This is the current model probability for the stagflation conclusion under the war overlay.", COLORS.stagflation)}
              </div>
              <div class="desk-meta" style="margin-top:0.9rem;">
                <span class="status-pill ${state.hypothesisClass}">${escapeHtml(state.hypothesisTone)}</span>
                <span class="meta-pill">Dominant view ${escapeHtml(state.dominant?.title || "n/a")}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          <section class="terminal-panel">
            <div class="terminal-panel-inner">
              <p class="section-kicker">Trade translation</p>
              <h2 class="section-title">Desk bias right now</h2>
              <p class="section-copy">This is the simplest trader-facing translation of the screen. It is intentionally rule-like: front-end, curve, then inflation expression.</p>
              <div class="bias-grid">
                ${state.deskBiases.map((row) => biasCard(row.statusClass, row.statusLabel, row.title, row.note, row.trade)).join("")}
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>
        </div>

        <div class="panel-grid">
          <section class="terminal-panel">
            <div class="terminal-panel-inner">
              <p class="section-kicker">Release sheet</p>
              <h2 class="section-title">If CPI / NFP hit now, what does the desk watch?</h2>
              <p class="section-copy">This is a desk reaction sheet, not a forecast. The point is to know which instruments move first and how that changes the stagflation hypothesis.</p>
              <div class="release-table-wrap">
                <table class="terminal-table release-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Release</th>
                      <th>Hot / strong outcome</th>
                      <th>Cool / weak outcome</th>
                      <th>Current bias</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    ${releaseRows(state.releasePlaybook)}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          <section class="terminal-panel">
            <div class="terminal-panel-inner">
              <p class="section-kicker">Hypothesis path</p>
              <h2 class="section-title">Stagflation vs alternatives from war start</h2>
              <p class="section-copy">This is the slower audit trail. It shows whether the war has been moving more like an inflation shock, a stagflation risk, or a growth scare over time.</p>
              ${history.length ? historyChart(history, scenarios) : '<div class="terminal-loading">No history available.</div>'}
            </div>
          </section>
        </div>

        <div class="panel-grid">
          <section class="terminal-panel">
            <div class="terminal-panel-inner">
              <p class="section-kicker">Desk tape</p>
              <h2 class="section-title">Core rates, credit, and energy monitor</h2>
              <p class="section-copy">This is the minimum live tape for the hypothesis: rates across maturities, curve, breakevens, credit, oil, and funding spreads.</p>
              <div class="table-wrap">
                <table class="terminal-table">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Series</th>
                      <th>Latest</th>
                      <th>1d</th>
                      <th>5d</th>
                      <th>z-score</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    ${signalRows(state.signalTable)}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          <section class="terminal-panel">
            <div class="terminal-panel-inner">
              <p class="section-kicker">Slower confirmation</p>
              <h2 class="section-title">Macro follow-through</h2>
              <p class="section-copy">These releases do not set the morning trade, but they tell you whether the war shock is becoming real inflation persistence, growth weakness, or both.</p>
              <div class="macro-grid">
                ${state.macroCards}
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>
        </div>

        <section class="terminal-panel">
          <div class="terminal-panel-inner">
            <p class="section-kicker">Daily audit trail</p>
            <h2 class="section-title">Day-by-day stagflation log</h2>
            <p class="section-copy">This log is deliberately narrow: dominant scenario, stagflation probability, and the inflation / growth / tightening legs that matter for the desk hypothesis.</p>
            <div class="table-wrap">
              <table class="terminal-table daily-table">
                <thead>
                  <tr>
                    <th>Date</th>
                    <th>Dominant</th>
                    <th>Stag prob</th>
                    <th>Inflation leg</th>
                    <th>Growth leg</th>
                    <th>Financial tighten</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  ${dailyRows(history)}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
            <p class="foot-note">Desk rule of thumb: stagflation risk is only compelling when the inflation leg stays high while the growth and tightening legs climb at the same time.</p>
          </div>
        </section>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  async function init() {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(SNAPSHOT_PATH, { cache: "no-store" });
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`Failed to load ${SNAPSHOT_PATH}: ${response.status}`);
      }
      const snapshot = await response.json();
      render(snapshot);
      status.innerHTML = `<span class="status-ping"></span><span>Live snapshot ${escapeHtml(prettyDateTime(snapshot.generated_at))}</span>`;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      status.innerHTML = `<span class="status-ping" style="background:#ff6e6e;box-shadow:none;"></span><span>Snapshot unavailable</span>`;
      app.innerHTML = `<div class="terminal-error">The published monitor could not be loaded. Check generated/snapshot.json and rebuild the snapshot.</div>`;
    }
  }

  init();
})();
</script>
